title: dialium pentandrum
intro: Dialium pentandrum, also known as the African Horse Apple, is a species of plant in the family Fabaceae. The African Horse Apple has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been found to aid in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dialium pentandrum include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's bark, leaves, and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes.
